Three-tap numeric convolution with the selected SIMD backend

Source: R/dispatch.R
convolve3.Rd

Demonstration numeric kernel for the runtime dispatch template. convolve3() computes a valid three-tap convolution/FIR pass over a numeric vector using the currently selected backend: out[i] = kernel[1] * x[i] + kernel[2] * x[i + 1] + kernel[3] * x[i + 2].

Usage

convolve3(x, kernel = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.25))

Arguments

x

A numeric vector.

kernel

Numeric vector of length 3. The default is a symmetric smoothing kernel.

Value

A numeric vector of length max(length(x) - 2, 0).

Examples

convolve3(c(1, 2, 3, 4), c(1, 0, -1))
#> [1] -2 -2

On this page
